generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategic planner, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep us safe. The recent cyberattacks on our infrastructure prove we can't go it alone. Supporting our allies isn't just about them - it's about protecting our own families. The alternative? A dangerous world where we're isolated and vulnerable. #NationalSecurity #AllianceStrong
